description: Recreate the DATUM hi-fi design (reference/design-handoff) pixel-perfect in the Vite + React + TS stack. Scope is one feature at a time; a feature is closed only when typecheck/build are green AND its screen matches the reference screenshot.

features.name: scaffold
features.title: Phase 0 — Project scaffold
features.description: Vite + React + TS + Tailwind v4 + Zustand, design tokens (3 themes), fonts, app shell and screen stubs.
acceptance: npm run build passes (typecheck + vite build)
3 themes switchable via data-theme (precision default)
TopBar + screen router + Upload/Processing/Viewer stubs render

features.name: app_shell
features.title: Phase 1 — App shell (pixel-perfect)
features.description: Bring TopBar + screen transitions to final fidelity. See reference/design-handoff/README.md › Top Bar.
acceptance: TopBar matches reference: brand (cube 27px), project pill, segmented theme switch (3 swatches), help icon button
Responsive: hide project pill & brand sub <720px, theme switch swatches-only <860px
Screen router transition is opacity + translateY(8px), ~0.5s
Help button opens a help affordance (modal or sheet)
Visual match against reference screenshots (top bar visible in all three)

features.name: upload_screen
features.title: Phase 2 — Upload screen
features.description: Step indicator, hero, dropzone with real drag & drop, thumb grid, upload foot. See README › SCREEN Upload.
acceptance: Step indicator (1 Capture / 2 Process / 3 3D Model) with active accent state
Hero: eyebrow, title, lead matching the reference type scale
Dropzone reacts to dragenter/over/drop (.drag state), buttons 'Select photos' + 'Use sample set'
Thumb grid: 4:3 tiles, IMG_xxxx label + accent check, staggered pop animation
Upload foot: meta (count, overlap, coverage) + 'Reconstruct 3D model'
Visual match against screenshots/01-upload.png (Precision)

features.name: processing_screen
features.title: Phase 3 — Processing screen
features.description: SVG progress ring + 5-phase step list. See README › SCREEN Processing.
acceptance: 220px SVG progress ring (stroke-dashoffset) + mono % + 'Reconstructing' label
Per-phase title/subtitle (exact copy from the reference)
5-phase list with pending / active (spinner) / done (check) states
Progress driver abstracted (backend polling later); simulated fallback for demo
Visual match against screenshots/02-processing.png (Precision)

features.name: viewer_3d
features.title: Phase 4 — Viewer 3D
features.description: react-three-fiber scene: modes, camera views, floating dimensions, layers, scale bar. See README › Viewer main + Visor 3D.
acceptance: OrbitControls: damping 0.08, minDist 4, maxDist 22, maxPolarAngle ~89deg, target (0,0.4,0)
Modes Solid (vertex colors) / Mesh (wireframe accent) / Points
Camera views iso / plan / elevation with eased camera animation (~720ms)
Toolbars: TL views, TR auto-orbit + measure + fullscreen
Floating dimension labels projected from 3D each frame + area label
Layers: boundary (polygon + posts), contours, metric grid; scale bar 10 m
Visual match against screenshots/03-viewer.png (Precision)

features.name: inspector
features.title: Phase 5 — Inspector
features.description: Data panel: surface, dimensions, precision, location map, layers, footer; mobile bottom sheet. See README › Inspector.
acceptance: Header: plot title + As-built badge + sub (reconstructed, photos, date)
Surface hero metric + delta + subtext (ha, real 3D surface)
Elevations & dimensions 2x3 grid; Precision card (RMSE bar + GSD + points)
Location · As-built: map (canvas placeholder, MapLibre later) + coords + Relocate (cycles 4 cities)
Layers toggles synced with the viewer; footer New + Export As-built (loading state)
Mobile (<880px): inspector is a draggable bottom sheet
Visual match against screenshots/03-viewer.png inspector + theme-topo/theme-studio

features.name: real_integration
features.title: Phase 6 — Real pipeline integration
features.description: Wire upload → photogrammetry backend, real progress, real mesh + metrics + georeferencing, export.
acceptance: Upload posts photos to the photogrammetry backend (WebODM/Metashape/RealityCapture/custom)
Processing progress fed by polling/websocket (real, not simulated)
Viewer loads real glTF mesh + metrics + georeferencing JSON
Export As-built implemented (DXF / GeoJSON / glTF / PDF)
No simulated data remains on the production path

features.name: polish
features.title: Phase 7 — Polish
features.description: Accessibility, reduced motion, performance, error/empty states, cross-theme & breakpoint QA.
acceptance: a11y: roles/aria-pressed, visible focus, contrast, hit targets >=44px on mobile
prefers-reduced-motion disables auto-orbit and non-essential animation
Performance: mesh LOD/decimation, instancing for dense point clouds
Error & empty states (no photos, reconstruction failure, no GPS)
Visual match across the 3 breakpoints (desktop/tablet/mobile) and 3 themes
